summary: Excellent implementation. YAML: pinned actions (v4), least-privilege `contents: read`, proper `$GITHUB_ENV` / `$GITHUB_OUTPUT` usage, sensible triggers (push/PR/schedule/dispatch with manual warning_days input), idempotent steps, clear job dependency structure. Python: strong type hints throughout (@dataclass, date, list[str]), custom ValidationError with actionable messages, pure testable functions (classify_secret, build_report, render_*), proper exit codes (0/1/2), comprehensive parsing validation, graceful defaults. No dead code, no duplication (fixture-based approach is by design per task requirements). Clear naming, logical section comments, well-structured error propagation. Both are production-ready with no breaking gaps.
